summary: Consistency fix release: full lab list preserved, data audit added, country normalization improved, candidate labs visible by default.
notes: The current data already contained the Pakistan records from the prior master list; v4.2 adds audit visibility so this can be verified in the UI.
No records are intentionally hidden by validation status.
Country aliases such as Pakstan/Pakistan, USA/United States, UK/United Kingdom are normalized in UI matching.
